TaggingRule: Tag when description signals disputes between businesses or commercial parties
ExamplesOrSignals: contract dispute; shareholder dispute; business litigation; arbitration

TaggingRule: Tag only when real estate work is contested or adversarial
ExamplesOrSignals: foreclosure; eviction; boundary dispute; real estate litigation

TaggingRule: Tag only when trusts or estates are disputed
ExamplesOrSignals: will contest; fiduciary dispute; contested probate
Exclusions: estate planning; wills drafting; tax planning

TaggingRule: Tag when IP work involves enforcement or disputes
ExamplesOrSignals: infringement; trade secret dispute; IP litigation

TaggingRule: Use when litigation is clear but no specific subject fits
ExamplesOrSignals: trial practice; civil litigation; dispute resolution

TaggingRule: Use as a negative rule for litigation tagging when descriptions mention non-adversarial real estate work
Exclusions: foreclosure; eviction; boundary dispute; contested proceeding
